selected_goal: Make the default asset-reference gate usable when generated companion outputs are absent by deriving manifest coverage from question_bank.json in memory and downgrading absent downstream exports to warnings.
why_this_now: Iteration 1 tightened manifest coverage, but the live project gate failed because output/json/asset_manifest.v1.json, Asterion exports, and topic-routing sidecar were absent while output/json/question_bank.json was present. The repair should let the gate validate the current question bank and canonical PNG paths without writing generated output files outside .agent-runs.
repo_evidence: .agent-runs/2026-06-18T22-15-18-167Z/iteration-01/04-audit-report.json recommends repairing or documenting the generated-output validation input set.
scripts/validate_asset_references.py currently exits non-zero solely because several companion JSON files are missing.
src/exam_bank/asset_manifest.py already has enough question-bank path and deterministic asset-id logic to derive manifest coverage in memory.
output/json/question_bank.json exists in the workspace, while output/json/asset_manifest.v1.json and output/asterion/exports/latest do not.
acceptance_criteria: validate_asset_references still errors when question_bank.json is missing or invalid.

When asset_manifest.v1.json is absent but question_bank.json is valid, validate_asset_references derives manifest asset IDs and canonical paths in memory and reports a warning rather than a hard missing-input error.
When optional downstream export files are absent, validate_asset_references reports warnings rather than hard missing-input errors.
The default scripts/validate_asset_references.py gate can run against the current workspace without failing solely due to absent companion outputs.
test_expectations: Add a fixture test where only question_bank.json and canonical image files exist; validation should be ok and should include warnings for derived manifest and missing optional inputs.
Keep the iteration-1 stale-manifest regression test passing when a manifest file is present but incomplete.
Run the asset-manifest test file and the default scripts/validate_asset_references.py gate.
implementation_boundaries: Do not write or regenerate output/json/asset_manifest.v1.json or Asterion exports.
Do not weaken validation when a provided manifest or provided export file is malformed or inconsistent.
Do not add dependencies or broad CLI modes.
Keep the change inside the existing asset-reference validator surface.
repo_hygiene_risk: The main risk is hiding a missing generated manifest. Mitigate by adding explicit warnings and summary source metadata instead of silently treating the manifest as present.
rollback_plan: Remove the missing-input warning behavior and in-memory manifest derivation from src/exam_bank/asset_manifest.py, then remove the new question-bank-only test.
done_when: The new question-bank-only validation test fails before implementation and passes after implementation.
scripts/validate_asset_references.py no longer fails solely because generated companion outputs are absent.
Agent 4 records any remaining live-output integrity failures as evidence for iteration 3.
